item.title: Life on the Fog Line
item.description: A look into recovery work along dangerous roadside conditions where visibility and safety are constant concerns. What makes fog-line work so risky?

media:content.media:title: Life on the Fog Line
media:content.media:description: A look into recovery work along dangerous roadside conditions where visibility and safety are constant concerns. What makes fog-line work so risky?

item.title: Runaway Call Leads to Code 3 Response
item.description: A high-priority recovery response is triggered after a runaway situation requires urgent attention. How do crews respond to emergency calls like this?

media:content.media:title: Runaway Call Leads to Code 3 Response
media:content.media:description: A high-priority recovery response is triggered after a runaway situation requires urgent attention. How do crews respond to emergency calls like this?

item.title: Box Truck in a Creek
item.description: A challenging recovery situation involving a box truck that has ended up in a creek. The video follows extraction efforts and coordination on site. What makes water recoveries so difficult?

media:content.media:title: Box Truck in a Creek
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery situation involving a box truck that has ended up in a creek. The video follows extraction efforts and coordination on site. What makes water recoveries so difficult?

item.title: It Worked!
item.description: A difficult recovery operation is completed successfully after careful planning and execution. What made this solution work?

media:content.media:title: It Worked!
media:content.media:description: A difficult recovery operation is completed successfully after careful planning and execution. What made this solution work?

item.title: What Are We Recovering?
item.description: A recovery crew arrives at a scene where the full situation is still unclear, requiring quick assessment and planning. How do you approach an unknown recovery?

media:content.media:title: What Are We Recovering?
media:content.media:description: A recovery crew arrives at a scene where the full situation is still unclear, requiring quick assessment and planning. How do you approach an unknown recovery?

item.title: Job Complete
item.description: A successful conclusion to a roadside recovery operation after completing the required work. The video shows final checks and wrap-up. What do you think is the most satisfying part of finishing a job?

media:content.media:title: Job Complete
media:content.media:description: A successful conclusion to a roadside recovery operation after completing the required work. The video shows final checks and wrap-up. What do you think is the most satisfying part of finishing a job?

item.title: Tornado Shelter Transport
item.description: Heavy tornado shelters are loaded and transported as part of a critical safety operation. What challenges come with moving oversized structures?

media:content.media:title: Tornado Shelter Transport
media:content.media:description: Heavy tornado shelters are loaded and transported as part of a critical safety operation. What challenges come with moving oversized structures?

item.title: Engine Trouble Signs
item.description: A recovery scenario highlights unusual engine noise that signals mechanical issues during operation. What can rough engine sounds indicate?

media:content.media:title: Engine Trouble Signs
media:content.media:description: A recovery scenario highlights unusual engine noise that signals mechanical issues during operation. What can rough engine sounds indicate?

item.title: Recovering a Stuck Vehicle
item.description: A roadside recovery operation focused on freeing a stuck vehicle using specialized equipment and techniques. The video highlights practical towing work. What’s the most important tool in a recovery job?

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Stuck Vehicle
media:content.media:description: A roadside recovery operation focused on freeing a stuck vehicle using specialized equipment and techniques. The video highlights practical towing work. What’s the most important tool in a recovery job?

item.title: That's What I Wanted
item.description: A successful recovery moment where everything finally goes as planned after a tough job. What made this outcome work so well?

media:content.media:title: That's What I Wanted
media:content.media:description: A successful recovery moment where everything finally goes as planned after a tough job. What made this outcome work so well?

item.title: Un-Decking Trucks
item.description: A specialized recovery involves carefully removing stacked or loaded trucks from a transport setup. What makes un-decking such a precise job?

media:content.media:title: Un-Decking Trucks
media:content.media:description: A specialized recovery involves carefully removing stacked or loaded trucks from a transport setup. What makes un-decking such a precise job?

item.title: Ford F250 vs. Box Truck
item.description: A recovery scenario involving a Ford F-250 and a box truck in a roadside situation. The video focuses on equipment use and extraction work. Which vehicle do you think handles recovery work better?

media:content.media:title: Ford F250 vs. Box Truck
media:content.media:description: A recovery scenario involving a Ford F-250 and a box truck in a roadside situation. The video focuses on equipment use and extraction work. Which vehicle do you think handles recovery work better?
